results.rendered_html:
dvaipa a. (pī f.) [dvīpino vikāraḥ -añ dvīpādāgataḥ -aṇ vā]
1 Relating to or
(pb) living on an island.
2 Belonging to a tiger, made of or covered with a tiger's skin.
— paḥ A car covered with a tiger's skin.
— paṃ The skin of a tiger.
